mapper.sql: homepage_id, excursions_idx, apply_yn, start_date, start_time, end_date, end_time, apply_start_date, apply_start_time, apply_end_date, apply_end_time, max_apply, add_date, date_type
mapper.select: SELECT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_EXCURSIONS_APPLY WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = A.HOMEPAGE_ID AND EXCURSIONS_IDX = A.EXCURSIONS_IDX) AS APPLY_COUNT FROM CMS_EXCURSIONS A WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND excursions_idx = #{excursions_idx}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_EXCURSIONS WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND excursions_idx = #{excursions_idx} AND APPLY_YN = 'Y' AND (START_DATE <= #{start_date} AND END_DATE >= #{start_date}) AND (END_DATE >= #{start_date} AND START_DATE <= #{start_date}) AND (TO_DATE(START_DATE || START_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DDHH24:MI') <= TO_DATE(END_DATE || #{end_time}, 'YYYY-MM-DDHH24:MI') AND TO_DATE(END_DATE || END_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DDHH24:MI') >= TO_DATE(END_DATE || #{end_time}, 'YYYY-MM-DDHH24:MI')) AND (TO_DATE(END_DATE || END_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DDHH24:MI') >= TO_DATE(START_DATE || #{start_time}, 'YYYY-MM-DDHH24:MI') AND TO_DATE(START_DATE || START_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DDHH24:MI') <= TO_DATE(START_DATE || #{start_time}, 'YYYY-MM-DDHH24:MI'))
mapper.update: UPDATE CMS_EXCURSIONS SET apply_yn = #{apply_yn}, start_date = #{start_date}, start_time = #{start_time}, end_date = #{end_date}, end_time = #{end_time}, apply_start_date = #{apply_start_date}, apply_start_time = #{apply_start_time}, apply_end_date = #{apply_end_date}, apply_end_time = #{apply_end_time}, max_apply = #{max_apply}, date_type = #{date_type} WHERE excursions_idx = #{excursions_idx} AND homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM CMS_EXCURSIONS WHERE excursions_idx = #{excursions_idx} and homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
mapper.select:
SELECT MIN( DECODE( TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'D'), 1, TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'FMDD'))) as SUN, MIN( DECODE( TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'D'), 2, TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'FMDD'))) as MON, MIN( DECODE( TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'D'), 3, TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'FMDD'))) as TUE, MIN( DECODE( TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'D'), 4, TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'FMDD'))) as WED, MIN( DECODE( TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'D'), 5, TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'FMDD'))) as THU, MIN( DECODE( TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'D'), 6, TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'FMDD'))) as FRI, MIN( DECODE( TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'D'), 7, TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'FMDD'))) as SAT FROM ( SELECT (A.BASE_MON + ROWNUM -1) AS days, A.BASE_MON, ((TRUNC(BASE_MON + ROWNUM - 1, 'D') - TRUNC(TRUNC(BASE_MON + ROWNUM - 1, 'Y'), 'D')) / 7 + 1) AS WEEK_NUM FROM (SELECT TO_DATE (#{plan_date}, 'yyyy-MM') BASE_MON FROM DUAL) A, DICTIONARY B ) C
WHERE C.DAYS <= LAST_DAY(BASE_MON) GROUP BY WEEK_NUM ORDER BY WEEK_NUM

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_EXCURSIONS WHERE 1=1 AND HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DATE_TYPE = #{date_type} AND START_DATE = #{start_date} AND ((START_TIME < #{start_time} AND END_TIME > #{start_time}) OR (START_TIME < #{end_time} AND END_TIME > #{end_time}))
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_CALENDAR_MANAGE WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DELETE_YN = 'N' AND DATE_TYPE = '1' AND START_DATE BETWEEN #{start_date} AND #{end_date}

SELECT TO_CHAR(START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS START_DATE, SUM(IMSI_V1) AS IMSI_V1, SUM(IMSI_V2) AS IMSI_V2, SUM(IMSI_V3) AS IMSI_V3, SUM(IMSI_V4) AS IMSI_V4, SUM(IMSI_V1+IMSI_V2+IMSI_V3+IMSI_V4) AS IMSI_V5 FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT(START_DATE + LEVEL -1) AS START_DATE, IMSI_V1, IMSI_V2, IMSI_V3, IMSI_V4 FROM ( SELECT TO_DATE(A.START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS START_DATE, TO_DATE(A.END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS END_DATE, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_EXCURSIONS_APPLY B WHERE B.EXCURSIONS_IDX = A.EXCURSIONS_IDX AND B.HOMEPAGE_ID = A.HOMEPAGE_ID AND B.APPLY_STATE = 1 ) AS IMSI_V1, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_EXCURSIONS_APPLY B WHERE B.EXCURSIONS_IDX = A.EXCURSIONS_IDX AND B.HOMEPAGE_ID = A.HOMEPAGE_ID AND B.APPLY_STATE = 2 ) AS IMSI_V2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_EXCURSIONS_APPLY B WHERE B.EXCURSIONS_IDX = A.EXCURSIONS_IDX AND B.HOMEPAGE_ID = A.HOMEPAGE_ID AND B.APPLY_STATE = 3 ) AS IMSI_V3, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_EXCURSIONS_APPLY B WHERE B.EXCURSIONS_IDX = A.EXCURSIONS_IDX AND B.HOMEPAGE_ID = A.HOMEPAGE_ID ) AS IMSI_V4 FROM CMS_EXCURSIONS A WHERE A.HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} ) CONNECT BY START_DATE + LEVEL -1 <= END_DATE order by start_date desc ) WHERE START_DATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{start_date},'yyyy-mm-dd') AND TO_DATE(#{end_date}, 'yyyy-mm-dd') GROUP BY ROLLUP (START_DATE ) ORDER BY START_DATE DESC

SELECT START_DATE, SUM(IMSI_V1) AS IMSI_V1, SUM(IMSI_V2) AS IMSI_V2, SUM(IMSI_V3) AS IMSI_V3, SUM(IMSI_V4) AS IMSI_V4, SUM(IMSI_V1+IMSI_V2+IMSI_V3+IMSI_V4) AS IMSI_V5 FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM') AS START_DATE, SUM(IMSI_V1) AS IMSI_V1, SUM(IMSI_V2) AS IMSI_V2, SUM(IMSI_V3) AS IMSI_V3, SUM(IMSI_V4) AS IMSI_V4 FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT(START_DATE + LEVEL -1) AS START_DATE, IMSI_V1,IMSI_V2,IMSI_V3,IMSI_V4 FROM ( SELECT TO_DATE(A.START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS START_DATE, TO_DATE(A.END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS END_DATE, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_EXCURSIONS_APPLY B WHERE B.EXCURSIONS_IDX = A.EXCURSIONS_IDX AND B.HOMEPAGE_ID = A.HOMEPAGE_ID AND B.APPLY_STATE = 1 ) AS IMSI_V1, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_EXCURSIONS_APPLY B WHERE B.EXCURSIONS_IDX = A.EXCURSIONS_IDX AND B.HOMEPAGE_ID = A.HOMEPAGE_ID AND B.APPLY_STATE = 2 ) AS IMSI_V2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_EXCURSIONS_APPLY B WHERE B.EXCURSIONS_IDX = A.EXCURSIONS_IDX AND B.HOMEPAGE_ID = A.HOMEPAGE_ID AND B.APPLY_STATE = 3 ) AS IMSI_V3, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_EXCURSIONS_APPLY B WHERE B.EXCURSIONS_IDX = A.EXCURSIONS_IDX AND B.HOMEPAGE_ID = A.HOMEPAGE_ID ) AS IMSI_V4 FROM CMS_EXCURSIONS A WHERE A.HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} ) CONNECT BY START_DATE + LEVEL -1 <= END_DATE order by start_date desc ) WHERE TO_CHAR(START_DATE,'YYYY') = #{start_year} GROUP BY ROLLUP (START_DATE) ) GROUP BY START_DATE, IMSI_V1, IMSI_V2, IMSI_V3, IMSI_V4 ORDER BY START_DATE DESC

SELECT START_DATE, SUM(IMSI_V1) AS IMSI_V1, SUM(IMSI_V2) AS IMSI_V2, SUM(IMSI_V3) AS IMSI_V3, SUM(IMSI_V4) AS IMSI_V4, SUM(IMSI_V1+IMSI_V2+IMSI_V3+IMSI_V4) AS IMSI_V5 FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(START_DATE, 'YYYY') AS START_DATE, SUM(IMSI_V1) AS IMSI_V1, SUM(IMSI_V2) AS IMSI_V2, SUM(IMSI_V3) AS IMSI_V3, SUM(IMSI_V4) AS IMSI_V4 FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT(START_DATE + LEVEL -1) AS START_DATE, IMSI_V1,IMSI_V2,IMSI_V3,IMSI_V4 FROM ( SELECT TO_DATE(A.START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS START_DATE, TO_DATE(A.END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS END_DATE, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_EXCURSIONS_APPLY B WHERE B.EXCURSIONS_IDX = A.EXCURSIONS_IDX AND B.HOMEPAGE_ID = A.HOMEPAGE_ID AND B.APPLY_STATE = 1 ) AS IMSI_V1, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_EXCURSIONS_APPLY B WHERE B.EXCURSIONS_IDX = A.EXCURSIONS_IDX AND B.HOMEPAGE_ID = A.HOMEPAGE_ID AND B.APPLY_STATE = 2 ) AS IMSI_V2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_EXCURSIONS_APPLY B WHERE B.EXCURSIONS_IDX = A.EXCURSIONS_IDX AND B.HOMEPAGE_ID = A.HOMEPAGE_ID AND B.APPLY_STATE = 3 ) AS IMSI_V3, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_EXCURSIONS_APPLY B WHERE B.EXCURSIONS_IDX = A.EXCURSIONS_IDX AND B.HOMEPAGE_ID = A.HOMEPAGE_ID ) AS IMSI_V4 FROM CMS_EXCURSIONS A WHERE A.HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} ) CONNECT BY START_DATE + LEVEL -1 <= END_DATE order by start_date desc ) WHERE TO_CHAR(START_DATE,'YYYY') BETWEEN #{start_year} and #{end_year} GROUP BY START_DATE ) GROUP BY ROLLUP (START_DATE) ORDER BY START_DATE DESC
